nasb.text: which is really not another; only there are some who are disturbing you and want to distort the gospel of Christ.

esv.text: not that there is another one, but there are some who trouble you and want to distort the gospel of Christ.

cnv.text: 其實那並不是另一個福音，只是有些攪擾你們的人，想把基督的福音改變。

ccb.text: 其实那并不是福音，只是某些人扰乱你们的信仰，想篡改基督的福音。

csbs.text: 其实那并不是另一个福音，而是有些人在搅扰你们，想要篡改基督的福音。
